channel.title: Dimension 20
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 on Dropout.tv

item.title: Welcome to the Wastes
item.description:
In an apocalyptic world, a team of do-gooders seek to put a little hospitality in the inhospitable.

Duration: 1:45:32

Tags: Dimension 20, Gladlands, mad max, post apocalyptic, dystopian, chaos, driving, cars, motorcycles, frog and toad, paddington bear, wholesome, optimism, cheerful, cozy, charming, friendship, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, ally beardsley, kimia behpoornia, vic michaelis, oscar montoya, zac oyama, jacob wysocki, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: Dimension 20: Gladlands Trailer
item.description:
Welcome to a world gone glad. New series premieres January 7th.
